comments.author: @GlobalTravelUS
comments.text: I never knew Saudi Arabia had such extreme geographical contrasts! Seeing snow-capped mountains and a ski resort project in Trojena, right in a country famous for 50°C desert heat, completely changed my perception of this nation. Thanks for an eye-opening travel video!

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: I’m so glad the video could show you the incredible geographical diversity and surprising contrasts of Saudi Arabia!
